ObjectName.value: Alan Turing. 2 Cornwall LGBT History Project 2016. Sculpted by Malcolm Lidbury

Categories.value: Suicide in art|Malcolm Lidbury|Nude males in sculpture|Self-published work|Sculptures of Alan Turing|LGBTQ+ art|LGBTQ history in the 20th century

ImageDescription.value: Alan Turing. Composite constructed sculpture of historical figure(s) reputed to have had a same sex relationships. Made of various materials & found objects with thin veneer film of bronze patina-ted paint giving appearance of solid bronze. A Metaphor of the appearance of solidity of LGBT rights & equality in law in the UK. Created by artist Malcolm Lidbury for 2016 LGBT History & Art Project Cornwall UK. http://www.gayhistorycornwall.com
